title: Prioritization Decision Record: next discovery slice
decision_scope: Choose the next bounded ProductOS slice across current problem, opportunity, and feature options.

ranked_options.title: Same-day discover packet wedge
ranked_options.rationale: This option sharpens the most credible current wedge while keeping proof posture bounded and reviewable.

ranked_options.title: Market intelligence distribution layer
ranked_options.rationale: This should follow after the discover wedge because it improves distribution and prioritization depth rather than first-order wedge proof.

decision_rationale: The current release boundary is still set by same-day discover quality, so that option should stay above broader market distribution work.

pm_override.rationale: The raw score for market distribution was close, but PM override preserved the nearer-term proof wedge.
